summary: Verified all 4 targeted frontend fixes on the public preview URL. Spelling fix (StreamRadar), no build/compile errors, right-aligned model showcase image, and Grandpashabet sponsor banner all pass.

spelling_fix.footer_infra_text: En iyi izleme deneyimi için Opera tarayıcısı kullanmanız önerilir.\n\nBu sitenin altyapısı lenstedreal StreamRadar tarafından yapılmıştır.

sponsor_banner.note: CTA text in DOM is Title Case; CSS may render uppercase via text-transform. Content matches spec.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 focused fixes verified on live preview. Spelling correct anywhere on page. No stray 'Stremradar'. Model image right-aligned (justify-content flex-end; right gap 113px vs left gap 1009px). Sponsor banner intact with correct URL. Previous iteration_2.json still lists open Match Center + stream refresh issues — those were NOT in this iteration's scope.
